name: Cashco Pawn Shop San Diego (Gold & Diamond Buyers)
description_short: San Diego-based pawn shop offering collateral loans, gold/jewelry buying, and retail shopping. BBB A+ rated with 20+ years of operation and two locations.
description_long:
CashCo Pawn Shop has operated in San Diego for over 20 years as a locally-focused pawnbroker and precious metals buyer. The company positions itself as a community-trusted financial solutions provider, emphasizing long-term customer relationships and ethical business practices. They hold a BBB A+ rating and claim multiple "Best Pawn Shop" awards from A-List, plus certification as America's first "green" pawn shop.

CashCo offers three primary services: pawn loans (short and long-term collateral-based financing), selling merchandise directly to the shop, and retail shopping from their inventory. Specific services include jewelry appraisals, jewelry repair, custom jewelry creation, and Military Lending Act (MLA) compliant loans for service members. They advertise pawn loan rates lower than California statutory requirements. A "First Loan Free" promotion is mentioned on their website, and they offer online payment options for existing loans.

The company differentiates itself through specialized expertise in jewelry and diamond evaluation, employment of eight trained pawnbrokers and sales associates by name, emphasis on community service and "giving back," and operational flexibility (365 days annually). Their website features customer testimonials highlighting friendly service and fair valuations. They maintain two physical locations in the San Diego area and operate an online shopping portal for merchandise.

As a pawn shop, CashCo's core function is providing secured loans and purchasing used goods—a legitimate but high-cost lending alternative. While they claim competitive rates, pawn loans inherently carry significant interest and the risk of item forfeiture. Customers should view this as emergency financing only, not a primary credit solution. Verification of specific rate claims and BBB/award credentials is recommended before transacting.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: BBB A+ rated with 20+ years operating history in San Diego market
Claims pawn loan rates lower than California state requirements
Offers MLA-compliant loans to qualified military service members
Free jewelry appraisals and consultation services
Specializes in jewelry, diamond, and precious metal evaluation with trained staff
Two physical locations plus online shopping portal for convenience
"First Loan Free" promotional offer advertised on website
Custom jewelry creation service available in-house
cons: Pawn loans are inherently high-cost financing with risk of item loss if loan defaults
Website displays placeholder statistics (0% customer satisfaction, 0+ specialists, 0 awards) that appear broken or unverified
No explicit APR disclosure or loan term details provided on website
Limited transparency on specific loan rates, fees, or terms before visiting location
Pawn lending is best-suited only for emergency short-term cash, not sustainable borrowing
best_for: Customers needing emergency cash secured by jewelry, electronics, or other valuables
Those seeking fair-market evaluation and quick liquidation of gold, diamonds, or collectibles
Military service members eligible for lower-cost MLA-regulated loans
Shoppers seeking discounted retail merchandise at rock-bottom prices
diagnosis: CashCo Pawn Shop is appropriate only for consumers facing genuine financial emergencies who possess valuables they can pledge as collateral and can afford to lose if unable to repay. Critical caveat: Pawn loans charge substantially higher effective interest rates than traditional credit and should never be considered a primary lending solution; they are a last-resort option to avoid.
services: Pawn loans (short and long-term collateral-based financing)
Direct purchasing of merchandise ("Sell It" service)
Retail shopping of used inventory online and in-store
Military Lending Act (MLA) compliant loans for service members
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 4502 University Ave STE 103, San Diego, CA 92105
